firstNight.helpText: Start the Night Phase.

subActions.description: Start the Night Phase.

subActions.description: Announce which players are affected by the Buddhist.

firstNight.name: Toymaker
firstNight.helpText: Resolve Minion Info and Demon Info, even though there are fewer than 7 players.

subActions.description: Resolve Minion Info and Demon Info, even though there are fewer than 7 players.

firstNight.name: Storm Catcher
firstNight.helpText: Announce which character is stormcaught. If that character is in play, mark that player as STORMCAUGHT. Wake each evil player and show them the character token, then the marked player. If not in play, wake each evil player, show them the THESE CHARACTERS ARE NOT IN PLAY token & the relevant character token.

subActions.description: Announce which character is stormcaught.
If that character is in play, mark that player as STORMCAUGHT.
Wake each evil player and show them the character token, then the marked player.
If not in play, wake each evil player, show them the THESE CHARACTERS ARE NOT IN PLAY token & the relevant character token.

firstNight.name: Wraith
firstNight.helpText: Wake the Wraith whenever other evil players wake.

subActions.description: Wake the Wraith whenever other evil players wake.

Show the YOU ARE and Minion tokens & give a thumbs-down.

Wake each target.
Show the YOU ARE and Minion tokens & give a thumbs-down.

Show the THIS CHARACTER SELECTED YOU & Boffin tokens, then the not-in-play good character token.

Wake the Demon.
Show the THESE CHARACTERS ARE NOT IN PLAY token.

firstNight.name: Minion Info

subActions.description: If there are 7 or more players, wake all Minions: Show the THIS IS THE DEMON token.
Point to the Demon.
Show the THESE ARE YOUR MINIONS token.

subActions.description: Wake each Minion.
Show the THESE CHARACTERS ARE NOT IN PLAY token.
Show 3 not-in-play character tokens.

firstNight.name: Lunatic
firstNight.helpText: If there are 7 or more players, wake the Lunatic: Show the THESE ARE YOUR MINIONS token. Point to any players. Show the THESE CHARACTERS ARE NOT IN PLAY token. Show 3 good character tokens. Put the Lunatic to sleep. Wake the Demon. Show the YOU ARE info token and the Demon token. Show the THIS PLAYER IS info token and the Lunatic token, then point to the Lunatic.

subActions.description: If there are 7 or more players, wake the Lunatic: Show the THESE ARE YOUR MINIONS token.
Point to any players.
Show the THESE CHARACTERS ARE NOT IN PLAY token.

firstNight.name: Demon Info

otherNights.helpText: A previously chosen player might be resurrected. The Shabaloth chooses 2 players.

subActions.description: A previously chosen player might be resurrected.
The Shabaloth chooses 2 players.

otherNights.name: Po
otherNights.helpText: The Po may choose a player OR chooses 3 players if they chose no-one last night.

subActions.description: The Po may choose a player OR chooses 3 players if they chose no-one last night.

otherNights.name: Fang Gu
otherNights.helpText: The Fang Gu chooses a player. If they chose an Outsider (once only): Replace the Outsider token with the spare Fang Gu token. Put the Fang Gu to sleep. Wake the target. Show the YOU ARE and Fang Gu tokens & give a thumbs-down.

subActions.description: The Fang Gu chooses a player.
If they chose an Outsider (once only): Replace the Outsider token with the spare Fang Gu token.
Put the Fang Gu to sleep.
Wake the target.
Show the YOU ARE and Fang Gu tokens & give a thumbs-down.

otherNights.name: No Dashii
otherNights.helpText: The No Dashii chooses a player.

subActions.description: The No Dashii chooses a player.

otherNights.name: Vortox
otherNights.helpText: The Vortox chooses a player.

subActions.description: The Vortox chooses a player.

otherNights.name: Lord of Typhon
otherNights.helpText: The Lord of Typhon chooses a player.

subActions.description: The Lord of Typhon chooses a player.

otherNights.name: Vigormortis
otherNights.helpText: The Vigormortis chooses a player. If that player is a Minion, poison a neighboring Townsfolk.

subActions.description: The Vigormortis chooses a player.
If that player is a Minion, poison a neighboring Townsfolk.

otherNights.name: Ojo
otherNights.helpText: The Ojo chooses a character.

subActions.description: The Ojo chooses a character.

otherNights.name: Al-Hadikhia
otherNights.helpText: The Al-Hadikhia chooses 3 players. In order, wake each target. They nod or shake their head. Put them to sleep before waking the next target.

subActions.description: The Al-Hadikhia chooses 3 players.
In order, wake each target.
They nod or shake their head.
Put them to sleep before waking the next target.

otherNights.name: Lleech
otherNights.helpText: The Lleech chooses a player.

subActions.description: The Lleech chooses a player.

otherNights.name: Lil' Monsta
otherNights.helpText: Wake the Minions. They choose a player. Put the Minions to sleep. Wake the target. Show the YOU ARE & Lil' Monsta tokens. A player might die.

subActions.description: Wake the Minions.
They choose a player.
Put the Minions to sleep.
Wake the target.
Show the YOU ARE & Lil' Monsta tokens.
A player might die.

otherNights.name: Yaggababble
otherNights.helpText: For each time the Yaggababble said their phrase today, a player might die.

subActions.description: For each time the Yaggababble said their phrase today, a player might die.

otherNights.name: Kazali
otherNights.helpText: The Kazali chooses a player.

subActions.description: The Kazali chooses a player.

otherNights.name: Assassin
otherNights.helpText: The Assassin might choose a player.

subActions.description: The Assassin might choose a player.

otherNights.name: Godfather
otherNights.helpText: If an Outsider died today, the Godfather chooses a player.

subActions.description: If an Outsider died today, the Godfather chooses a player.

otherNights.name: Gossip
otherNights.helpText: If the Gossip is due to kill a player, they die.

subActions.description: If the Gossip is due to kill a player, they die.

otherNights.name: Hatter
otherNights.helpText: If the Hatter died, wake the Minions & Demons. Each may choose a new character. If they do, show the YOU ARE token & their new character token.

subActions.description: If the Hatter died, wake the Minions & Demons.
Each may choose a new character.
If they do, show the YOU ARE token & their new character token.

otherNights.name: Barber
otherNights.helpText: If the Barber died today or tonight, show the Demon the THIS CHARACTER SELECTED YOU & Barber tokens. If the Demon chose 2 players, wake one at a time. Show the YOU ARE token & their new character token.

subActions.description: If the Barber died today or tonight, show the Demon the THIS CHARACTER SELECTED YOU & Barber tokens.
If the Demon chose 2 players, wake one at a time.
Show the YOU ARE token & their new character token.

otherNights.name: Sweetheart
otherNights.helpText: If the Sweetheart died, a player became drunk immediately. If you haven't done this yet, do so now.

subActions.description: If the Sweetheart died, a player became drunk immediately.
If you haven't done this yet, do so now.

otherNights.name: Plague Doctor
otherNights.helpText: If the Plague Doctor died, the Storyteller gained a Minion ability. If you haven't done this yet, do so now.

subActions.description: If the Plague Doctor died, the Storyteller gained a Minion ability.
If you haven't done this yet, do so now.

otherNights.name: Sage
otherNights.helpText: If the Demon killed the Sage, wake the Sage and point to 2 players, 1 of which is the Demon.

subActions.description: If the Demon killed the Sage, wake the Sage and point to 2 players, 1 of which is the Demon.

otherNights.name: Banshee
otherNights.helpText: If the Banshee was killed by the Demon tonight, announce that the Banshee has died.

subActions.description: If the Banshee was killed by the Demon tonight, announce that the Banshee has died.

otherNights.name: Professor
otherNights.helpText: The Professor might choose a dead player.

subActions.description: The Professor might choose a dead player.

otherNights.name: Choirboy
otherNights.helpText: If the Demon killed the King, point to the Demon player.

subActions.description: If the Demon killed the King, point to the Demon player.

otherNights.name: Huntsman
otherNights.helpText: The Huntsman might choose a player. If they chose the Damsel: Put the Huntsman to sleep. Wake the target. Show the YOU ARE info token & their new character token.

subActions.description: The Huntsman might choose a player.
If they chose the Damsel: Put the Huntsman to sleep.
Wake the target.
Show the YOU ARE info token & their new character token.

otherNights.name: Damsel
otherNights.helpText: If the Damsel was chosen by the Huntsman, show the YOU ARE info token & their new character token.

subActions.description: If the Damsel was chosen by the Huntsman, show the YOU ARE info token & their new character token.

otherNights.name: Amnesiac
otherNights.helpText: Do whatever needs to be done to satisfy the Amnesiac's ability.

subActions.description: Do whatever needs to be done to satisfy the Amnesiac's ability.

otherNights.name: Farmer
otherNights.helpText: If the Farmer died tonight, wake a living good player. Show the YOU ARE info token and a Farmer token.

subActions.description: If the Farmer died tonight, wake a living good player.
Show the YOU ARE info token and a Farmer token.

otherNights.name: Tinker
otherNights.helpText: The Tinker might die.

subActions.description: The Tinker might die.

otherNights.name: Moonchild
otherNights.helpText: If the Moonchild is due to kill a good player, they die.

subActions.description: If the Moonchild is due to kill a good player, they die.

otherNights.name: Grandmother
otherNights.helpText: If the grandchild was killed by the Demon, the Grandmother dies too.

subActions.description: If the grandchild was killed by the Demon, the Grandmother dies too.

otherNights.name: Tor
otherNights.helpText: If a player died tonight, show the YOU ARE info token, their character token, & a thumbs up or thumbs down.

subActions.description: If a player died tonight, show the YOU ARE info token, their character token, & a thumbs up or thumbs down.

otherNights.name: Ravenkeeper
otherNights.helpText: If the Ravenkeeper died tonight, the Ravenkeeper chooses a player. Show that player's character token.

subActions.description: If the Ravenkeeper died tonight, the Ravenkeeper chooses a player.
Show that player's character token.

otherNights.name: Empath
otherNights.helpText: Give a finger signal.

subActions.description: Give a finger signal.

otherNights.name: Fortune Teller
otherNights.helpText: The Fortune Teller chooses 2 players. Nod if either is the Demon (or the RED HERRING).

subActions.description: The Fortune Teller chooses 2 players.
Nod if either is the Demon (or the RED HERRING).

otherNights.name: Undertaker
otherNights.helpText: If a player was executed today, show their character token.

subActions.description: If a player was executed today, show their character token.

otherNights.name: Dreamer
otherNights.helpText: The Dreamer points to a player. Show 1 good & 1 evil character token, 1 of which is their character.

subActions.description: The Dreamer points to a player.
Show 1 good & 1 evil character token, 1 of which is their character.

otherNights.name: Flowergirl
otherNights.helpText: Either nod or shake your head.

subActions.description: Either nod or shake your head.

otherNights.name: Town Crier
otherNights.helpText: Either nod or shake your head.

subActions.description: Either nod or shake your head.

otherNights.name: Oracle
otherNights.helpText: Give a finger signal.

subActions.description: Give a finger signal.

otherNights.name: Seamstress
otherNights.helpText: The Seamstress might choose 2 players. Nod or shake your head.

subActions.description: The Seamstress might choose 2 players.
Nod or shake your head.

otherNights.name: Juggler
otherNights.helpText: Give a finger signal.

subActions.description: Give a finger signal.

otherNights.name: Balloonist
otherNights.helpText: Point to a player with a different character type to the previously shown player.

subActions.description: Point to a player with a different character type to the previously shown player.

otherNights.name: Village Idiot
otherNights.helpText: Wake the Village Idiots one at a time to choose a player. Give a thumb signal.

subActions.description: Wake the Village Idiots one at a time to choose a player.
Give a thumb signal.

otherNights.name: King
otherNights.helpText: If the dead equal or outnumber the living, show the character token of a living player.

subActions.description: If the dead equal or outnumber the living, show the character token of a living player.

otherNights.name: Bounty Hunter
otherNights.helpText: If the player marked KNOW died today or tonight, point to the new player marked KNOW.

subActions.description: If the player marked KNOW died today or tonight, point to the new player marked KNOW.

otherNights.name: Nightwatchman
otherNights.helpText: The Nightwatchman might choose a player. Put the Nightwatchman to sleep. Wake the target. Show the THIS PLAYER IS & Nightwatchman tokens, then point to the Nightwatchman.

subActions.description: The Nightwatchman might choose a player.
Put the Nightwatchman to sleep.
Wake the target.
Show the THIS PLAYER IS & Nightwatchman tokens, then point to the Nightwatchman.

otherNights.helpText: The Cult Leader might change alignment. If so, show the YOU ARE info token & give a thumb signal.

subActions.description: The Cult Leader might change alignment.
If so, show the YOU ARE info token & give a thumb signal.

otherNights.name: Butler
otherNights.helpText: The Butler chooses a player.

subActions.description: The Butler chooses a player.

otherNights.name: Spy
otherNights.helpText: Show the Grimoire for as long as the Spy needs.

subActions.description: Show the Grimoire for as long as the Spy needs.

otherNights.helpText: Point to a player.

otherNights.helpText: The Chambermaid chooses 2 living players. Give a finger signal.

otherNights.helpText: Give a finger signal.

subActions.description: Give a finger signal.

otherNights.name: Riot
otherNights.helpText: Change the Riot reminder token to the relevant day. If it is night 3, you may wake the Minions. Show the YOU ARE & Riot tokens.

subActions.description: Change the Riot reminder token to the relevant day.
If it is night 3, you may wake the Minions.
Show the YOU ARE & Riot tokens.

otherNights.name: Dawn
otherNights.helpText: Wait for a few seconds. End the Night Phase.

subActions.description: Wait for a few seconds.
End the Night Phase.

otherNights.name: Leviathan
otherNights.helpText: Change the Leviathan reminder token to the relevant day. You may announce that the Leviathan is in play.
